commit_message: fix: Adjust processor control unit port mappings and IF/ID write enab… fix: Adjust processor control unit port mappings and IF/ID write enab… This pull request introduces significant structural and interface changes to the processor's RTL VHDL code, focusing on modularizing the pipeline stages, simplifying the memory interface, and improving clarity in signal and entity definitions. The changes include the creation of new stage modules (`main`, `stages`, `memory_stage`), major refactoring of the
